## What's Changed
* Implement Obsidian community plugin: fix title bar to `<Vault Name> - Obsidian <Version>` by @Copilot in https://github.com/tsubasaogawa/obsidian-plugin-flexible-title-text/pull/1
* feat: configurable window title template by @Copilot in https://github.com/tsubasaogawa/obsidian-plugin-flexible-title-text/pull/3
* chore: change ver by @tsubasaogawa in https://github.com/tsubasaogawa/obsidian-plugin-flexible-title-text/pull/4
* fix: project title by @tsubasaogawa in https://github.com/tsubasaogawa/obsidian-plugin-flexible-title-text/pull/5
* fix: delete version placeholder. by @tsubasaogawa in https://github.com/tsubasaogawa/obsidian-plugin-flexible-title-text/pull/6
* docs: readme by @tsubasaogawa in https://github.com/tsubasaogawa/obsidian-plugin-flexible-title-text/pull/7
* chore: 未使用の ESLint パッケージを削除 by @tsubasaogawa in https://github.com/tsubasaogawa/obsidian-plugin-flexible-title-text/pull/8
* chore: update pkg by @tsubasaogawa in https://github.com/tsubasaogawa/obsidian-plugin-flexible-title-text/pull/9

## New Contributors
